Ploy CLI v2

Usage:
  ploy <command> [<args>]

Core Commands:
  mig              Plan and run Migs workflows
  run              Inspect runs and stream events
  job              Inspect and follow job logs
  pull             Pull Migs diffs for current repo HEAD
  cluster          Manage clusters (nodes, tokens)
  config           Inspect or update cluster configuration
  spec             Inspect and validate mig specs
  tui              Interactive TUI for migrations, runs, and jobs

Use 'ploy help <command>' for detailed command help.
